subcodes.first_line: All praise be unto God, Who hath revealed the law of obligatory prayer as a reminder to His servants, and enjoined on them the Fast that those possessed of means may become apprised of the woes and sufferings of the destitute
subcodes.subjects: @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @law of fasting, @law of obligatory prayer, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
